response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, backend, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no demonstrated C-for-UNIX embedded firmware experience in recent years, no Linux kernel modification background, no networking security stack experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP), and critically no Japanese language proficiency which is a hard requirement.
strengths: Long, varied software development career with C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
Some low-level systems work via DLang async I/O and embedded-adjacent projects
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency — hard requirement not met
No demonstrated Linux kernel analysis or source modification experience
No networking security stack experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, switch chips)

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / LAN-switch security background
